channel.title: RetroMac
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.8.2
item.description:
RetroMac 1.8.2

  • Webcam lower-third fixes: the on-screen name bar no longer flickers, the Late Night (Gold) / Newsroom style now follows your setting, and long names fit the bar.
  • Built-in diagnostics: Settings ▸ About ▸ Diagnostics captures a log you can copy or save — making display, camera and dock issues much easier to track down.
  • Plus stability hardening: the system Dock reliably comes back after quitting, and assorted dock/window fixes.

item.title: Version 1.8.1
item.description:
RetroMac 1.8 — new Special Themes, boot screens & screensavers

  • New Special Themes: Windows 98 (with classic games and sheep.exe!), Windows XP, and Mac OS X with its glossy Aqua look — plus classic apps like Internet Explorer, Notepad and Paint.
  • Boot screens: authentic startup videos when you switch to Windows XP, Windows 98 or Mac OS 9 — click to skip to the desktop.
  • Classic screensavers: a per-theme saver (3D Pipes, FlowerBox, Flying Toasters, Flurry) — pick yours in Settings ▸ Screensaver.
  • Smarter minimize into the themed dock, new CPU Monitor & Desktop Clock widgets, plus widget, dock and stability fixes throughout.

item.title: Version 1.8.0
item.description:
RetroMac 1.8 — three new Special Themes, and even more retro vibes

  • New Special Themes — true to the originals: Windows 98 (with classic games and sheep.exe!), Windows XP, and Mac OS X with its glossy Aqua look.
  • Surf the past: under Windows XP and Windows 98 you can now browse the web with Internet Explorer — just like back in the day.
  • Smarter minimize: windows now minimize into the right dock — the themed dock instead of the system Dock.
  • New widgets & lots of polish: fresh widgets like the CPU Monitor and Desktop Clock, plus stability improvements and a ton of detail work.

item.title: Version 1.7.3
item.description:
RetroMac 1.7.3

  • Clock widget: now remembers its last position and no longer jumps on screen when opened.
  • BeOS Classic: drag the clock by its yellow tab again.
  • CPU widget: opens directly at its saved spot — no more visible jump.
  • Dock right-click now offers “RetroMac Settings” and “Quit RetroMac”.

item.title: Version 1.7.2
item.description:
RetroMac 1.7.2

  • Clock widget: a themed analog clock (BeOS, Mac OS 9, Windows XP, Maiks Favourite) — open it from the deskbar/taskbar clock or a desktop icon.
  • Maiks Favourite: pixel-art macOS window chrome for the CPU widget, App Folder, Music (TV streams) folder and the Downloads dock fan.
  • Menu polish: themes and shaders sorted alphabetically; a crown marks the special themes; the permission-free “Lite” shaders sit right under Free.
  • Stronger LCD Lite shader, clean start (nothing auto-activated), and numerous fixes.

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
RetroMac 1.7 — The big themes overhaul

  • Themes Overhaul — BeOS, Windows XP & Mac OS 9: a massive rework, as close to the originals as possible — including a native CPU widget and authentically styled windows in each theme.
  • New theme “Maiks Favourite”: an animated Pac-Man dock and live previews of your running apps.
  • Webcam support stabilized: more reliable virtual-camera toggling and retro effects.
  • Stability & fixes: numerous bug fixes and general stability improvements.

item.title: Version 1.3
item.description:
RetroMac 1.3

  • Dock auto-hide: reclaim screen space on 1080p monitors — dock slides in on mouse proximity
  • Freedoom: free Doom experience with native CRT shader (auto-download)
  • Quake 1 & 2 via RetroArch with CRT shader and WASD controls
  • Native PK3 shaders for Duke Nukem 3D and Shadow Warrior (zero input lag)
  • Removed all overlay-based game shaders — native engine shaders only

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
RetroMac 1.1

  • Automatic updates via Sparkle
  • Fixed theme switching crash (BeOS to Snow Leopard)
  • Dynamic trash icon (empty/full state)
  • Improved Screen Recording permission onboarding
  • User-friendly error messages for missing permissions
